answers: Electric vehicles (EVs) run on electric motors powered by rechargeable batteries instead of gasoline engines. They produce zero direct emissions and are cheaper to operate long-term.
EV er advantage holo: no fuel cost (electricity e charge hoy), kam maintenance, zero emission, ar quieter ride. Disadvantage holo upfront cost beshi ar charging infrastructure limited.
Electric cars work by using a large battery pack to power an electric motor. You charge the battery at home or at charging stations. Most modern EVs get 200-400 km per charge.

EVs are the future of transportation. While the upfront cost is higher, you save significantly on fuel and maintenance. Many countries offer tax incentives, and charging infrastructure is expanding rapidly.
